english_news.title: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
english_news.summary: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave.

english_news.title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
english_news.summary: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.

english_news.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
english_news.summary: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.

english_news.title: SpaceX stock falls 9%, pacing for third-straight day of losses after red-hot IPO start
english_news.summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past two full days of trading.

english_news.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
english_news.summary: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the Persian Gulf loaded with oil.

english_news.title: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
english_news.summary: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.

english_news.title: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
english_news.summary: Will Cathcart will step down as the head of WhatsApp and move into another role at the company. Kunal Shah will take over.

english_news.title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
english_news.summary: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.

english_news.title: Vance says Iran will allow nuclear inspectors back into the country
english_news.summary: The US vice-president says a great deal of progress has been made after the first round of talks between the US and Iran.

english_news.title: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
english_news.summary: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.

english_news.title: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
english_news.summary: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.

english_news.title: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
english_news.summary: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.

english_news.title: Clive Davis, music mogul behind Whitney Houston and Bruce Springsteen, dies aged 94
english_news.summary: The record company executive also worked with Billy Joel, Pink Floyd, Alicia Keys and Aerosmith.

english_news.title: Red heat alerts issued in France, Italy and Spain as 40C temperatures forecast
english_news.summary: The heatwave conditions are forecast to intensify in the coming days across central and western Europe.

english_news.title: WhatsApp to be led by Indian start-up founder as Will Cathcart steps back
english_news.summary: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.

english_news.title: Kenya minister found in contempt of court over US-backed Ebola centre
english_news.summary: Aden Duale defied a High Court order to stop building work on a controversial US-funded facility.

english_news.summary: The venture is subject to regulatory approvals but will be co-chaired by ICE and former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who began working with OKX in 2023.

chinese_news.title: 映界科技：一支00后团队的空间智能“赌注” | 水下项目
chinese_news.summary:
当人形机器人在春晚上扭秧歌，在马拉松赛场上健步如飞，一个尴尬的现实浮出水面：机器人会动、很灵活，但不能干活——前者考验运动控制能力，后者还需要机器人真正理解物理环境，记住物体位置、推理空间关系。

感知瓶颈是今天几乎所有具身智能从业者都无法回避的现实。成立不到三个月的「映界科技」（MirrorSpace）正试图补齐具身智能产业链中的这个短板。映界科技由三位平均年龄仅有24岁的博士团队创办，专注具身机器人视觉空间感知系统的算法与硬件研发，致力于成为世界模型时代的基础设施服务商。

“我们注意到，目前市面上还没有相对成熟完善的空间感知解决方案，大部分做传感器的企业只是把雷达、摄像头等设备的原始数据丢给本体厂商，让他们自己想办法处理。”金依力表示，“我们希望提供一整套空间感知能力，弥合机器人在开放场景应用落地的gap。”

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报｜赢创计划全球裁员3200人；台积电28nm较年初减产25%；三星电子向韩国所有员工开放ChatGPT和Codex
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

赢创计划全球裁员3200人

赢创近日宣布，将延长“赢创定制”增效计划，涉及赢创全球所有业务及职能部门，拟裁减约3200个岗位，其中德国本土约占2150个。相关措施计划于2027年启动，持续至2029年底。6月22日，赢创确认，德国以外地区将削减1050个职位，中国区包含在内，但具体裁员数量尚未明确。“赢创定制”计划于2023年10月推出，原定目标为2026年底前累计削减约2800个岗位。今年5月，赢创曾表示该计划进展顺利并将实现既定降本目标。

chinese_news.title: 圆桌论坛：在没人相信之前，乘风破浪的创er | 36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
每一个创业者，都有一段“没人相信”的日子。但正是那段日子，把他们推向了浪尖。创业是鲜活的，接下来这一场，我们听一听那些在质疑声中长大的创业者，怎么把“不可能”变成“不，可能”。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑:

许嘉婧｜36氪后浪研究所 主理人（主持人）

徐子悦 ｜PhotonPay 光子易商务副总裁

程刚｜KOOK语音 创始人兼CEO

徐良威｜智域基石CTO

程二亭｜万拿机器人 创始人&CEO

薛昊昕｜

chinese_news.title: 圆桌讨论：在番禺，我们造了什么？｜36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
“2026年，创投圈的浪潮再次翻涌：AI从技术概念走进产业深水区，硬科技创业从“小众赛道” 变成“主流共识”，年轻的创业者们正在用代码和双手，重新定义中国创新的未来坐标。

每一年，由36氪 · 暗涌主办的WAVES大会，都是中国创投圈的年度风向标。今年的 WAVES 2026以“今年盛夏”为主题，落地广州番禺良仓新造创意园，在两天的时间里，我们汇聚了顶级投资人、产业领袖、新锐创业者，用14场深度圆桌、数十场独立演讲，拆解 AI、硬科技、出海、医疗等核心赛道的底层逻辑，见证那些“少数人” 的坚持，如何汇聚成改变行业的浪潮。”

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $70,000 by end of June 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC tapped $65.5K on Iran oil deal signal; technical RSI divergence and weekly closes above $63K suggest bottom formation with $70K breakout target live.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: Bitcoin price taps $65.5K as Iran deal sees oil drop; JPMorgan Bitcoin mining sensitivity analysis

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Alphabet (GOOGL) stock recover to pre-May decline levels within 60 days?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Alphabet pacing worst day in a year on AI researcher exodus; high-profile departures create binary recovery/deterioration sentiment test.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX achieve $150B+ private valuation before Dec 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX IPO June 12 rallied then dropped 9% over 3 days; Colossus data center deal worth $6.3B (Anthropic, Google, Cursor contracts) signals infrastructure moat but post-IPO volatility creates mispricing.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: SpaceX signs computing power deal with Reflection worth up to $6.3B; SpaceX stock falls 9% after IPO

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum Foundation leadership stabilize (no further exodus announcements) by Sept 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CoinDesk reports talent exodus and leadership debate; mirrors Alphabet's AI researcher departures; binary test of org stability vs. continued brain drain.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: Ethereum Foundation talent exodus sparks fresh debate over leadership

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will US Senate pass housing bill limiting PE single-family purchases by Aug 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Both chambers poised to advance sprawling package this week; clear legislative momentum with measurable binary outcome tied to floor votes.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OKX-ICE joint venture (co-chaired by Andrew Cuomo) receive all required regulatory approvals and launch by Dec 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: OKX official press release, ICE investor relations, SEC/CFTC filing confirmations
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: TradFi-crypto bridge ventures face regulatory uncertainty but Cuomo's political capital and ICE's standing reduce tail risk; market likely overweights binary approval/denial vs. phased rollout.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and ICE; CoinDesk: OKX and NYSE partner

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin mining network's price sensitivity (as measured by hashrate correlation to BTC spot) remain elevated (>0.7 Pearson r) through Sept 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: JPMorgan Bitcoin mining analysis reports, blockchain.com hashrate data, CoinMetrics mining economics indices
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: JPMorgan signal is fresh but market may not yet price sustained hashrate volatility; institutional hedging behavior could dampen sensitivity; underappreciated by retail prediction markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: JPMorgan: Bitcoin mining network becoming more sensitive to price swings

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum close above $3,500 by Oct 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, Coinbase OHLCV feed, Binance spot close
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Ethereum Foundation turmoil depresses sentiment despite DeFi and Layer 2 revenue strength; talent exodus is governance signal, not product deterioration.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Ethereum Foundation talent exodus + multiple institutional ETH accumulation signals (Bitmine $92M add)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Iran officially allow IAEA nuclear inspectors back on-site within 90 days (by Aug 5, 2026)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: IAEA official statements, UN Security Council reports, Reuters/AP wire feeds on inspector deployment
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: VP Vance claims progress but diplomatic statements are soft signals; oil market is pricing binary outcome but geopolitical prediction markets under-weight verification delays.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC: Vance says Iran will allow nuclear inspectors back; CNBC: Treasury authorizes Iranian oil sales through August

market_questions_to_create.question: Will tokenized RWA trading platforms (tracked by Enso, Ondo, Franklin Templeton) achieve $500M+ TVL by Dec 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: DeFi Llama RWA category, Enso protocol TVL, official platform AUM disclosures
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Enso launched 500+ tokenized assets; US equity tokenization demand from European investors is real but illiquidity and custody concerns underexplored; market may conflate token supply with genuine adoption.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Enso launches RWA app and trading for over 500 tokenized assets citing growing EU demand for US equity exposure

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC against DXY and oil volatility as Iran deal + Greenspan death signal regime shift toward lower real rates and geopolitical de-escalation.
supporting_signals: Bitcoin tapped $65.5K on Iran oil slide to 16-week lows (Cointelegraph)
Treasury authorizes Iranian supertankers; VP Vance signals nuclear deal progress (BBC, CNBC)
JPMorgan notes mining network hashrate sensitivity elevated; Tom Lee bullish on 'crypto spring' amid macro backdrop (CoinDesk)
Weekly BTC closes above $63K with RSI divergence suggest momentum bottom (Cointelegraph data)
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran deal unravels or stalls; US geopolitical stance hardens (e.g., asset freezes, sanctions escalation); DXY rallies on Fed tightening persistence.
investment_theses.expression: BTC/DXY ratio (long BTC perps, short DXY via 3x inverse ETF or FX forwards); or direct BTC spot if conviction high

investment_theses.thesis: Short Alphabet (GOOGL) into further AI talent exodus; reputational/competitive risk to search moat outweighs near-term valuation support.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Alphabet pacing worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile researcher exits
Parallel to Ethereum Foundation exodus; brain drain signals org dysfunction (CoinDesk)
Google lost compute deal negotiating leverage vs. Anthropic/Cursor (SpaceX Colossus partnership), suggesting product/culture erosion
investment_theses.counter_view: GOOGL sell-off overdone; AI research departures are normal attrition; core search/ads business insulated from researcher churn; stock mean-reverts on valuation.
investment_theses.expression: Short GOOGL via put spreads (sell $155 call, buy $150 put, 60-DTE) or 2x inverse ETF (PSQ) sizing 2–3% of portfolio

investment_theses.thesis: Long SpaceX infrastructure (via secondary market shares or future ETF exposure) despite post-IPO pullback; Colossus data center moat and $6.3B AI compute deal validates 10-year thesis.
supporting_signals: SpaceX Colossus data center signed Anthropic, Google, Cursor contracts totaling $6.3B (CNBC)
Post-IPO 9% drop is capitulation by retail; institutional rebalancing should stabilize valuation
AI compute infrastructure scarcity (NVIDIA constraint, hyperscaler buildout cycles) favors SpaceX vertical integration
investment_theses.counter_view: SpaceX IPO lockup expirations trigger secondary selling; Colossus compute margins compressed by hyperscaler competition; geopolitical risk (Ukraine, Iran, Taiwan) disrupts supply chain.
investment_theses.expression: Long SpaceX shares via Forge, EquityZen, or secondary funds; or NVDA/QCOM as proxy for data center buildout beneficiary

investment_theses.thesis: Long Solana-adjacent tokens (Pump.fun, Pudgy Penguins) and validator/payment infrastructure (MoneyGram on Solana) as network effect and fintech adoption accelerate.
supporting_signals: MoneyGram joins Solana as validator amid stablecoin payment push (CoinDesk)
Pump.fun, Synapse, RE, PENGU trending on crypto exchanges; retail volume and builder sentiment robust
Meta WhatsApp leadership change (Kunal Shah, Indian fintech founder) signals push into emerging-market payments; Solana ecosystem plays
investment_theses.counter_view: Pump.fun and memecoin ecosystem are bubble-prone; regulatory crackdown on decentralized finance; MoneyGram adoption remains niche.
investment_theses.expression: Long SOL spot or SOL/ETH ratio; or selective long PUMP, PENGU if conviction on user adoption (not speculation); use 1–2% sizing given volatility

investment_theses.thesis: Long US housing-related equities (homebuilders, REITs) if Senate housing bill passes; PE single-family purchase restrictions support home price/supply dynamics.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Senate poised to advance housing bill this week; both chambers expected to pass sprawling package
Supply constraint (PE acquisitions) removal is pro-affordability, pro-homeowner equity; could unlock institutional capital reallocation to traditional real estate
investment_theses.counter_view: Bill stalls in committee or faces filibuster; housing shortage persists due to zoning, labor costs (not PE purchase restrictions); homebuilder valuations already price in relief.
investment_theses.expression: Long IYR (iShares US Real Estate ETF) or XHB (Homebuilders ETF); or select Lennar (LEN), KB Home (KBH) if sector rotation confirmed

flagged_chinese_media_insights.relevance: Early-stage hard tech signal: Chinese venture ecosystem betting on robot spatial reasoning (complement to humanoid actuation hype). May precede US embodied AI commodity cycle.

flagged_chinese_media_insights.english_coverage_status: PARTIAL (capacity reports exist, but scale/timeline underreported in English financial media)
flagged_chinese_media_insights.relevance: Supply chain signal: older-node underutilization suggests 2026 semiconductor cycle reset. Evonik layoffs (chemicals/materials) indicate capex retreat across chip supply.

flagged_chinese_media_insights.story: Shanghai/Guangzhou startup momentum in robotics (云鲸智能 CloudMinds, HORWIN), AI-driven city services; investor consensus on hard tech as 'mainstream' not niche

flagged_chinese_media_insights.relevance: Macro signal: Chinese VC conviction on robotics/embodied AI + smart city infrastructure is structural, not cyclical. May fuel long-duration USD weakness vs. CNH if capex proves sticky.
